mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, email, display_name, is_default, created_at FROM TENANT_SENDER WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at
SELECT id, tenant_id, email, display_name, is_default, created_at FROM TENANT_SENDER WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_default = TRUE LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TENANT_SENDER WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND email = #{email}
